hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & python (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/game_studio_hook.py') session-start"

hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & python (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/game_studio_hook.py') pre-tool"

hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & python (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/game_studio_hook.py') post-edit"

hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & python (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/game_studio_hook.py') pre-compact"
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & python (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/game_studio_hook.py') post-compact"
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & python (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/game_studio_hook.py') subagent-start"
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & python (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/game_studio_hook.py') subagent-stop"
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & python (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/game_studio_hook.py') stop"
